ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository where the project is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user responsible for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived, on hold) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the project (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., VSS, Git, SVN) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was last updated */,
  "auth_type" TEXT /* Type of authentication used (e.g., basic, token, SSH) */,
  "auth_credentials" TEXT /* Authentication credentials (encrypted) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository is active and in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "node" TEXT /* Node or configuration parameter name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration parameter (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration parameter */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration parameter is required */,
  "value" TEXT /* Current value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  "encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration value is encrypted */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment associated with the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, build engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, lead) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions for the user in the project */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last time the user accessed the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the build belongs to */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build started */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build completed */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the build */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build record was last updated */,
  "triggered_by_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the build was triggered */,
  "triggered_by_host" TEXT /* Hostname from which the build was triggered */,
  "build_log" TEXT /* Summary log of the build process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_triggered_by FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the deployment is based on */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the deployment was performed (e.g., dev, staging, prod) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment started */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment completed */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment record was last updated */,
  "triggered_by_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the deployment was triggered */,
  "triggered_by_host" TEXT /* Hostname from which the deployment was triggered */,
  "deployment_log" TEXT /* Summary log of the deployment process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_triggered_by FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., build script, build server) */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., deployment script, deployment server) */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_logs_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the environment is active and in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
